title: Attendance Records Collection
description: Finalized IN/OUT clock records for payroll and attendance tracking

deviceId.description: ID of device that recorded this event (e.g. DEV001)

location.description: Physical location of device (e.g. Front Gate, Warehouse Door)

verified.description: Whether this record has been verified by manager

notes.description: Any notes about this attendance (e.g. manually approved, adjusted)

minutesLate.description: Minutes late from scheduled start (0 if on-time)

manual.description: True if manually entered by admin/manager

manualEnteredBy.description: User ID who manually entered this record

manualEnteredAt.description: When this record was manually entered

validation_rules: employeeId must be valid (exist in employees collection)
timestamp must be in ISO 8601 UTC format
type must be either IN or OUT
date must be extracted from timestamp and match YYYY-MM-DD format
For each employee, IN times must precede OUT times in daily sequence
deviceId should reference valid device in devices collection
minutesLate should be 0 or positive integer
verified field automatically updated when payroll is run
Manual entries must have manualEnteredBy and manualEnteredAt
shiftPair populated only after matching IN/OUT pair

payroll_integration.pairing_logic: System matches IN/OUT pairs per employee per day. Unpaired events flagged as anomalies.
payroll_integration.late_calculation: If IN time > scheduledStart (after grace period): minutesLate = IN_time - scheduledStart - grace_period
payroll_integration.break_handling: Unpaid breaks deducted from hoursWorked; paid leave added
payroll_integration.rounding: All decimals rounded to nearest 0.01 hours / 1 minute

notes: Stores complete audit trail of clock events
shiftPair field computed during payroll processing
Manual entries require approval and are logged to audit_logs
Indexes optimized for: lookup by employee+date, recent events, device logs
TTL index can be set on createdAt for retention policy (e.g. 3 years)
